title: New Collection Reveal + Giveaway | Sunshine & Good Times!
excerpt: Wouldn't it be amazing if every single day everyone around the world was blessed with light, love and things that make them happy?! Much of the inspiration for this collection came from a desire to spread joy in a world…
body:
Wouldn't it be amazing if every single day everyone around the world was blessed with light, love and things that make them happy?! Much of the inspiration for this collection came from a desire to spread joy in a world that could definitely use more of it. Delighted to bring you this collection with American Crafts! Can you believe it's the 14th one?! Bonus points for anyone who can name them all in order because I am not even sure I can do it. I'll share more about the collection very soon but for now, let's do a mini prize pack giveaway before you can buy it! 

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED: To enter to win the prize pack... Leave a comment with something that makes you happy or what you're most excited about this year. I'm looking forward to sharing even more with you on this blog on a more regular basis (there are some super fun things in the works!). Winner will be announced on this post January 12! THANKS TO ALL WHO ENTERED: THE WINNER IS HEIDI! CONGRATS! Stay tuned for more giveaways coming up!

May your days be filled with sunshine and good times - GOOD LUCK!
